headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: Siri is evolving into a smarter, more automated voice assistant inside Apple’s ecosystem. Super is built for a different job: persistent personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache, making repeated workflows more durable and efficient. This page compares what Siri is best at today with where Super is intentionally different — and why many users choose Super for ongoing computer-use work.
